arts.ttl: Bournemouth send officials for key clash – Manchester United’s presence not new at club
arts.sum: Midtjylland picked up a 4-2 win over Copenhagen in the Danish Superliga yesterday. It has now emerged that officials from Bournemouth and Manchester United were keeping a close eye on the tie. TipsBladet have reported that a host of players were on show during the game and as a result, multiple European clubs were watching The post Bournemouth send officials for key clash – Manchester United’s presence not new at club appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: How to get involved with Palace for Life's matchday takeover at Selhurst Park
arts.sum: At Crystal Palace’s fixture against Bournemouth on Saturday, Palace for Life Foundation, the club's official charity, are hosting a 'takeover' of Selhurst Park to raise awareness of their vital work across the South London community.

arts.ttl: 'What we demand from each other': Glasner’s pre-Bournemouth press conference
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says Crystal Palace are targeting a return to the principles which have made them such a challenging opponent to face in recent months, as the Eagles prepare to host Bournemouth at Selhurst Park on Saturday (19th April, 15:00 BST).
The Premier League have confirmed that Crystal Palace’s match away at Tottenham Hotspur will now take place on Sunday, 11th May, kicking off at 14:15 BST.

arts.ttl: Forever Palace: Fliss reflects on her time in red and blue
arts.sum: After a 15-year playing career, including three unforgettable seasons at Crystal Palace, Fliss Gibbons has announced that she will be hanging up her boots at the end of the season.
